form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 365m at this track. Not keen, needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 365m at this track. Not keen, needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn to the home straight and ran wide.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a scorching early split, weakening late to finish a 2.75 lengths fourth (29.97) over 520m at this track. Goes very well from this draw including three wins. Solid prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a scorching early split, weakening late to finish a 2.75 lengths fourth (29.97) over 520m at this track. Goes very well from this draw including three wins. Solid prospects.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 8 length fifth (19.45) at Bulli. Previous form sound including a win three back at Bulli. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 8 length fifth (19.45) at Bulli. Previous form sound including a win three back at Bulli. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 365m in 20.85. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at NG level. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 365m in 20.85. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at NG level. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Placed last time (30.45) at Taree Super Track in a NG, finishing second and beaten a nose. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from eight starts. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (30.45) at Taree Super Track in a NG, finishing second and beaten a nose. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from eight starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Has won three in a row. Good effort to score just four days ago over 365m at this track by 5 lengths in a NG. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 20.27. Top chance.
